title: MAP 6.13: Implement pre-dispatch policy checker and capability gates
description: Implementation task for approved TASK-153 and TASK-156 specs. Build the executable pre-dispatch policy checker and capability whitelist gates described by map-task-tiering-spec.md, map-pre-dispatch-policy-checker-spec.md, map-capability-whitelist-test-plan.md, and map-threat-model.md.
acceptance_criteria: Implements a deterministic pre-dispatch checker that returns allow, require_approval, or reject from permission tier, destructive-action policy, decision class, risk class, trust-boundary, and task-tier metadata.
Rejects helper/local assignments for final review, final decision, broad architecture ownership, broad rewrite, destructive operation, shell/network, and canonical MAP mutation cases.
Requires command-center or owning-core approval before dispatch for destructive Tier 1 work, AUTHORITY/POLICY decisions, SECURITY/STRUCTURAL risks, and unknown-risk trust-boundary crossings.
Runner and agent-loop tests prove rejected work is not recommended/claimed and approval-required work routes to a visible gate instead of normal dispatch.
